---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement to the project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem, limitation, or friction are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature or improvement you want to add.

## Why this matters

Explain why this change would improve the project.

## Scope

- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Alternatives considered

List any alternatives you considered before proposing this approach.

## Additional context

Include links, examples, references, or design notes if they help clarify the request.
